title: Azure VM Diagnostic Output
description: Schema for diagnostic output with 7 required fields

decision.description: Decision state indicating diagnostic confidence level

diagnosis.description: Human-readable description of the identified issue or healthy state

confidence_score.description: Confidence score from 0.0 to 1.0 indicating diagnostic certainty

evidence.description: List of telemetry signals that support the diagnosis

evidence_gap.description: List of missing or incomplete telemetry signals needed for higher confidence

next_check.description: Specific diagnostic action to gather more information (required for abstain decisions)

explanation.description: Multi-sentence reasoning describing why this decision was made
